text.title: Solo Change Order Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: draft email → send → capture YES → store immutable → invoice with reference.

step.name: draft-email
step.input: Client request + master SOW reference + rate card
step.action: Run `compose-co-email`. Subject anchors to master SOW. Body has 4 explicit deltas + "Reply YES to authorize". Run `extract-deltas` from scope diff.
step.decision-gate: If any delta is "TBD", do NOT send; negotiate the number first.

step.name: send
step.action: Send to client channel. Note send timestamp. Begin verbal_authorization_hours clock if work starts ahead of YES.

step.name: capture-yes
step.action: Run `capture-acceptance`. Confirm reply is the verbatim "YES" or a quoted-table confirmation. Stop verbal_authorization clock.
step.decision-gate: If no YES within 8 verbal hours, send a one-line "starting under verbal authorization, please confirm in email today" and PAUSE further work.

step.name: store-immutable
step.action: Render CO + reply chain as PDF; upload to immutable storage. Record `artefact.immutable_link`.

step.name: invoice-with-reference
step.action: On next invoice, add line referencing `co_id` + `immutable_link`. Store `invoice_line_ref` back into the CO record.
